title.value: ConceptMap for mapping Nuva vaccine codes to SNOMED-CT vaccine codes

description.value: This ConceptMap maps vaccine codes from the Nuva terminology to the corresponding codes in the SNOMED-CT CodeSystem. It is generated based on the provided CSV mapping file and the SNOMED-CT CodeSystem.
